rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax
Refer only to component names, ports, and data types from the AADL model structure
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Omit unsafe Boolean comparisons unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool
Do not invent numeric bounds not stated in the requirement
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for assignments valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
Do not create x >= 0 assumptions for numeric ports without explicit requirement support
